subcodes.title: Rashh-i-'Ama
subcodes.first_line: Tis from our rapture that the clouds of realms above are raining down; ’Tis from Our anthem that the mysteries of faith are raining down
subcodes.first_line_orig: رشح عما از جذبه ما میریزد سر وفا از نغمه ما میریزد از باد صبا مشک خطا گشته
subcodes.subjects: @symbolism, @poems and quotation from poetry, @mystical themes, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity
